rationale: The citing paper appears to reference Sotgiu and Gielens (2015) only once, in the limitations/future-research discussion, to note that supplier/manufacturer effects in price wars are outside this paper's scope. The cited study is not used to build the focal conceptual framework, derive hypotheses, specify the empirical model, or interpret the main media-related results. Its role is therefore a peripheral pointer to related work rather than a meaningful input to the paper's core argument.
